title: Dominion Energy Could Cut Its Dividend
text: Dominion Energy has underperformed the utility sector and stock market over the past 1-, 3-, 5-, and 10-year periods. The stock's high dividend yield suggests relatively high risk. It recently maintained its dividend per share for 8 consecutive quarters, and its payout ratio is stretched, making it a risky investment for investors, especially those who focus on income.

title: Dominion Energy: On A Path Toward A More Attractive Debt Situation
text: Dominion Energy is currently saddled with an unattractive amount of debt. D recently paid off $3.3B in debt and has declared its intent to spend all available after-tax earnings to pay it down further. To force an alignment of incentives, a significant portion of the CEO's compensation has been tied to investor returns.

title: 7 Dividend Stocks You Need To Own If the Market Crashes
text: Everything is starting to look rosy again. The inflation data for October came in below the estimates; earnings have been reasonably good for the third quarter, and Congress may get the ongoing budget issues sorted out for a few years instead of a few weeks.

title: Dominion (D) to Develop Cutting-edge Battery Storage With VSU
text: Dominion (D) decides to test another long-duration battery storage project for the Multi-Purpose Center at Virginia State University.

title: Wall Street Cheers This High-Yield Stock's Big Announcement: Is It a Buy?
text: Dominion Energy announced it was undertaking a business review in 2022. Since then, It has made several big asset sales -- and still plans more steps.

title: Dominion Energy partners with Virginia State University on cutting-edge battery storage project
text: •  Proposed pilot would provide backup power to 6,000-seat venue  RICHMOND, Va. , Nov. 16, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Dominion Energy Virginia is partnering with Virginia State University to develop an innovative battery storage project that would provide backup power to the VSU Multi-Purpose Center (MPC).

title: This Brilliant Dividend Stock Is Adding Even More Power to Grow Its Payout
text: Enbridge is investing in a solar energy joint venture in Ohio. The initial phase should start producing electricity and cash flow by the end of this year.

title: Dominion Energy Shares Signs of Utility Scams, Urges Customers to Stay Safe As Holidays Approach
text: National Utility Scam Awareness Day is Nov.15 RICHMOND, Va. , Nov. 15, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- With another busy holiday season fast approaching, Dominion Energy is reminding customers that utility scammers never take a vacation.

title: Dominion Energy Virginia, State Corporation Commission Staff, Office of the Attorney General, and Other Parties File Comprehensive Settlement of Biennial Rate Case
text: Customer rates substantially below national average RICHMOND, Va. , Nov. 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Virginia Electric and Power Company (Dominion Energy Virginia or DEV), a subsidiary of Dominion Energy, Inc. (NYSE: D), together with the State Corporation Commission Staff (Commission Staff), the Office of the Attorney General, and multiple other intervening parties, today submitted a comprehensive settlement in the pending biennial rate case for approval by the State Corporation Commission of Virginia (Commission).

title: Dominion Energy offers energy saving tips and bill payment assistance options as winter approaches
text: RICHMOND, Va. , Nov. 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- As winter approaches, Dominion Energy Virginia is reminding customers of energy-saving tips to help save money and providing bill payment assistance options for customers in need.

title: Renewable Revolution: 3 Green Energy Stocks Outshining Their Peers
text: As nations rally around green initiatives, green energy stocks are gaining prominence, driven by major policy tailwinds. The U.S. is targeting a 52% cut in emissions, and China is on a path to neutralize its CO2 emissions over the next four decades.

title: Fate of Millions of Veterans' Educational Benefits Lies With Supreme Court
text: Troutman Pepper, Dominion Energy Wrap Oral Arguments in Eight-Year Rudisill Case WASHINGTON , Nov. 8, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The nation's highest court will now decide whether millions of veterans are eligible to receive expanded educational benefits as oral arguments in  Rudisill v. McDonough concluded today.

title: Dominion Energy Upholds Big Dividend, Shares Pop
text: Dominion Energy reported 3Q 2023 earnings, driving multiple stakes into the ground to reduce uncertainty that's been dogging the shares. Management is executing clear priorities to re-tool the company. The CVOW project remains on time and on budget. CEO Bob Blue offered a straight-line commitment to the current dividend.  No walk-backing.

title: S&P 500 Gains and Losses Today: Upgrades Help Lift Dominion Energy and Clorox Shares

title: Utility Stock Scores Post-Earnings Bull Notes

title: Dominion Energy Announces Retirements of Two Directors, Election of Two New Independent Directors as Part of Continuing Board Refreshment

title: Dominion Energy Continues to Advance Business Review; Announces Third-Quarter 2023 Earnings
text: Priorities & commitments of ongoing business review are unchanged including commitment to current dividend Fully regulated Coastal Virginia Offshore Wind (CVOW) project on time and on budget; company in advanced stages of process to assume a noncontrolling equity financing partner – final strategic step outstanding in business review Company to conclude review upon completion of CVOW partnership decision; expected by year-end 2023 or early 2024 Cove Point and gas utilities accounted for as discontinued operations; removed from operating earnings Third-quarter 2023 GAAP net income of $0.17 per share; operating earnings (non-GAAP) of $0.77 per share Company initiates fourth-quarter 2023 operating earnings (non-GAAP) guidance of $0.35 per share RICHMOND, Va. , Nov. 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Dominion Energy, Inc. (NYSE: D), today provided an update on its comprehensive business review and announced third-quarter 2023 earnings.

title: Wind power is losing in New Jersey, but winning in Virginia. Here's where the rest of the U.S. stands.
text: The Biden administration early this week approved the construction of the largest wind-power farm in the United States, more than 170 giant turbines to be built roughly 27 miles off the coast of Virginia Beach, Va.

title: Dominion Energy Declares Quarterly Dividend of 66.75 Cents
text: RICHMOND, Va. , Nov. 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The board of directors of Dominion Energy (NYSE: D) has declared a quarterly dividend of 66.75 cents per share of common stock.
